gaps.suggestion: Change 'only when' to 'when', or add '(or removed manually)'. Residual from the earlier gate-only model.

gaps.gap: Capture 'usable from any Shield skill' but no command/helper/write-contract specified.
gaps.suggestion: Define the capture entrypoint; main /plan-level unknown.

gaps.gap: No quantified problem baseline; honestly logged as an unvalidated assumption.
gaps.suggestion: Add one real figure from past /implement transcripts to harden why-now (1b/11a/11b).

gaps.gap: Eager-removal 'transient promotion reference' mechanism is prose-only (how /plan//implement receive + act on it).
Eager prune and /backlog sweep overlap; interaction undefined.
gaps.suggestion: State both triggers are idempotent (remove-if-present) so re-evaluation is a no-op.

informational_nfr_notes: Schema versioning (6e): add schema_version to backlog.json + migration policy now.
Read-contract drift (6f): reconciliation treats unrecognized manifest.json/plan.json shapes as 'doubt → entry stays', never crash.
Perf budget (5a): state a /backlog sweep budget (e.g. <1s up to ~50 features) to trigger the §9 index decision.
Rollback (6c): name a trigger to fall back to manual-remove-only if eager prune wrongly removes.
